zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Despenser II於1336年3月24日出生在英國盧特藍德艾森丁時，他的父親Edward Despenser I26歲，母親Anne Ferrers20歲。他於1347年11月12日與Elizabeth de Burghersh在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1356年登記服兵役。他於1357年被列為member of parliament。他去世於1375年11月11日在英國享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利福可斯波利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Despenser II was born on 24 March 1336, in Essendine, Rutland, England, his father, Edward Despenser I, was 26 and his mother, Anne Ferrers, was 20. He married Elizabeth de Burghersh on 12 November 1347, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. He registered for military service in 1356. In 1357, at the age of 21, his occupation is listed as member of parliament. He died on 11 November 1375, in England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Despenser II est né le 24 mars 1336, à Essendine, Rutland, Angleterre, son père, Edward Despenser I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anne Ferrers, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Burghersh le 12 novembre 1347, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1356. En 1357, à l’âge de 21 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1375, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Despenser II am 24. März 1336 in Essendine, Rutland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Despenser I 26 und seine Mutter Anne Ferrers 20. Er hat am 12. November 1347 in Irland Elizabeth de Burghersh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er hat sich 1356 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1357, als er 21 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. November 1375 im Alter von 39 Jahren in England und wurde in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth de Burghersh il 12 novembre 1347, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1356. ja.lifeSummary: Edward Despenser IIが1336年3月24日にイギリスルトランドエセンディンで生まれた時，父Edward Despenser Iは26歳，母Anne Ferrersは20歳であった。1347年11月12日にアイルランドでElizabeth de Burghershと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1356年に兵役登録をした。1357年，21歳の時，職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1375年11月11日にイギリスで39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーテウケスブリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucester: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Edward Despenser II(이)가 1336년 3월 24일 영국 루틀랜드 에센딘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Despenser I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Ferrers(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1347년 11월 12일 아일랜드에서 Elizabeth de Burghersh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1356년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1357년, 21세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1375년 11월 11일 영국에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucester: Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Despenser II nasceu em 24 de março de 1336, em Essendine, Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Despenser I, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anne Ferrers, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Burghersh em 12 de novembro de 1347, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1356. Em 1357, com 21 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament. Ele faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1375, em Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucester: тюкесбури эбби, тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Despenser II родился 24 марта 1336 г. в местности эссенден, рутланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward Despenser I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Ferrers, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Burghersh 12 ноября 1347 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. В 1356 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1357 году, в возрасте 21 год, работал по профессии member of parliament. Он умер 11 ноября 1375 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности тюкесбури эбби, тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucester: Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Despenser II nació el 24 de marzo de 1336, en Essendine, Rutland, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward Despenser I, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anne Ferrers, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Burghersh el 12 de noviembre de 1347, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1356. En 1357, a la edad de 21 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1375, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
